title: senecio acaulis
intro: Senecio acaulis, also known as stemless ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio acaulis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Senecio acaulis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat a variety of ailments.
